Interface FormalSystemExporter

All Superinterfaces:
ResourceIO<Map<String,Object>>, ResourceWriter<Map<String,Object>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
CoqExporter, MetamathExporter, QedeqExporter
public interface FormalSystemExporter extends ResourceWriter<Map<String,Object>>
Interface for exporting a logical system to an external formal verification tool.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    exportSystem(Map<String,Object> system, File file)
    Exports a system to a file.

    Exports the given logical context/system to the specified writer.

  • Method Details

    • exportSystem

      void exportSystem(Map<String,Object> system, Writer writer) throws IOException
      Exports the given logical context/system to the specified writer.
      Parameters:
      system - the system components to export
      writer - the writer to output to
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • exportSystem

      default void exportSystem(Map<String,Object> system, File file) throws IOException
      Exports a system to a file.
      Parameters:
      system - the system components to export
      file - the file to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • exportSystem

      default void exportSystem(Map<String,Object> system, String filePath) throws IOException
      Exports a system to a file path.
      Parameters:
      system - the system components to export
      filePath - the path to the file
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • save

      Description copied from interface: ResourceWriter
      Saves the resource to a destination.
      Specified by:
      save in interface ResourceWriter<Map<String,Object>>
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getName

      default String getName()
      Description copied from interface: ResourceIO
      Returns the display name of this resource handler. MUST be implemented with I18N support.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      the display name

      Returns the category for grouping. MUST be implemented with I18N support.

    • getSupportedVersions

      default String[] getSupportedVersions()
      Returns the supported versions of the formal system format. Each exporter class should override this to declare specific version support.
      Specified by:
      getSupportedVersions in interface ResourceIO<Map<String,Object>>
      Returns:
      array of supported version strings

    • getFileExtension

      String getFileExtension()
      Returns the file extension typically used by this system.
      Returns:
      the file extension (e.g., ".v", ".mm")
